case_title: MIGUEL ANGEL MAYA VS. SALVADOR VILLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,250.00 FILED BY MAYA, MIGUEL ANGEL AS TO DEFENDANT VILLA, SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYA, MIGUEL ANGEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(NO DATE OF MAILING*)* (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED FEB-04-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VILLA, SALVADOR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYA, MIGUEL ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VILLA, SALVADOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
